title: LCU
description: Linear Combination of Unitaries (LCU) algorithm allows for the implementation of non-unitary operators M = sum_j alpha_j U_j on quantum computers.

params.help: Weight coefficients alpha_j of the Pauli unitary operators. Provide a Python/JSON-style numeric list; its length must match paulis.
params.name: alphas
params.info: 请输入数字列表，长度必须与paulis一致（如 [0.6, 0.4]）

params.help: Corresponding Pauli unitary operator list. Provide a Python/JSON-style string list using only I, X, Y, Z; each Pauli string length must equal n.
params.name: paulis
params.info: 请输入Pauli字符串列表，长度必须与alphas一致，且每个字符串长度等于n（如 ["I", "X"]）

params.help: The number of qubits in the system register.
params.name: n
